mapper.insert: insert into alert (device_id, type, level, message, detection_id, image_url, latitude, longitude, status, create_time) values (#{deviceId}, #{type}, #{level}, #{message}, #{detectionId}, #{imageUrl}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, 1, now())
mapper.select: select a.*, de.name as device_name, u.name as processor_name from alert a left join device de on a.device_id = de.id left join user u on a.processor_id = u.id where a.id = #{id}
